name: Super Taco Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients except flour, oil, and vinegar in the crock pot.
2. Stir well.
3. Cover and cook on Low setting for 8 to 10 hours.
4. Remove cover and turn to High setting for one hour to reduce excess moisture.
5. Stir in flour, oil, and vinegar. Allow to cool.
6. Force through a sieve or place in blender and puree until smooth. Note that a sieve will remove bitter skins and seeds, making it the better choice, though slightly more tedious.
Makes about 8 cups (64 2-tablespoon servings).
